title: lugaion umbellatum
intro: Lugaion umbellatum, also known as Wild Chamomile or Wild Daisy, is a perennial herb belonging to the plant family Asteraceae. It is native to Europe and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lugaion umbellatum include relieving anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and reducing inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Lugaion umbellatum can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health conditions.
